name: sysGetVariableArrayLength
title: sysGetVariableArrayLength
syntax: dword sysGetVariableArrayLength(char namespace[], char variable[]); // form 1
description: Returns the length of the array of the system variable.

parameters.name: SysVarName
parameters.description: Name of the fully qualified name of the system variable, including all name spaces, separated by "::". The name must be preceded by "sysVar::".

return:
For system variables of type data, returns the current size (in bytes) of the value.
For system variables of type long or float array, returns the number of elements in the array.
For system variables of type string, returns the length of the string, excluding the terminating 0 character.
For system variables of type long or float, returns 1.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
